problem_statement: Monthly reporting has repeated manual steps, structured input/output files, and known approval risks. M4 scores the opportunity as useful but still human-controlled before G1 design.

recommendation.title: Enable the workflow before design
recommendation.rationale: Value=100, feasibility=100, risk=3, evidence_confidence=0.94. Human oversight remains necessary because approval and security boundaries still matter.

alternative_options.title: Assistive work guide
alternative_options.rationale: Guide the user through checks and evidence capture while execution stays manual.

score_explanation: Value 100: repeated monthly work, manual steps, pain points, and a time metric are present.
Feasibility 100: structured files, stable systems, and explicit rules are present.
Risk 3: security constraint and exception handling require human control.
Evidence confidence 0.94: source links and confirmed claims are strong.
Oversight 4: human approval remains required before any external action.

blocked_reasons: Risk requires stronger human oversight before design

retained_responsibilities: Approve any action that affects external systems
Keep final decision authority with the user
approval_points: Before any pilot uses real business data
Before recommendations are applied to production work
exception_handling: Route known exceptions to manual review

assumptions: M4 does not estimate money from real measurements.
Hours are deterministic placeholders derived from captured work structure.

risks.description: The work model may still omit edge cases or control points.
risks.control: Require playback confirmation and readiness review before G1 design.

risks.description: Constraints mention security, authority, privacy, or financial exposure.
risks.control: Keep external execution and credential collection out of scope.

open_questions: Collect evidence for ERP API access boundary
Clarify human approval and authority boundary

validation_experiment.hypothesis: The scored opportunity reflects the confirmed work model evidence.
validation_experiment.method: Review score explanations, blockers, and evidence references with the user.
validation_experiment.sample: Latest schema-valid Work Model for one project.
success_criteria: Gate result is accepted as ENABLE_FIRST.
Blocking reasons and follow-ups are either resolved or explicitly deferred.

mvp_scope: Resolve readiness blockers before G1 design work
